title: 3Powers auto-fix loop preferences (auto-fix.yaml)
description: Governs the harness's bounded, code-only remediation loop. Advisory only: never a gate, verdict, or ledger input. A missing or malformed file falls back to the shipped defaults.

enabled.description: Whether the run-path auto-fix loop is on (default true). A standalone `3pwr gate run` never auto-fixes regardless.

max_attempts.description: Most coder attempts before the loop gives up (default 3, clamped to >=1).

scope_to_failed.description: Scope each coder dispatch to the failed gates' files when known (default false).
